title: Observable — How a Protein Finds Its Shape

distribution_flags: [SOCIAL] Social platforms require AI disclosure labels — verify current ToS
notes: Social = mass dissemination. Platform AI-label + community guidelines apply.
Revise and re-submit to Legal Gate (Gate 0).

science_subject.key_measurement: Anfinsen (1973): amino-acid sequence determines native structure; folded geometry resolved by crystallography (hemoglobin, PDB 4HHB, 1.74 Å); folding-funnel ensemble (Dill & Chan 1997) resolves Levinthal's paradox
science_subject.visualization_prompt: Scientific molecular visualization, protein folding — an extended unfolded polypeptide collapsing through an ensemble of transient intermediates into a compact native fold, alongside a GroEL/GroES chaperonin barrel assisting, a faint folding-funnel energy landscape clearly marked as schematic, crowded aqueous cytoplasm, neutral dark background, accurate relative scale, no anthropomorphic faces, multiple parallel folding routes not one path, reversible thermodynamic process, Jantzen molecular-cellular fidelity, 16:9, ILLUSTRATIVE NOT TO SCALE label lower corner

sources.citation: Fermi G, Perutz MF, Shaanan B, Fourme R. The crystal structure of human deoxyhaemoglobin at 1.74 Å resolution. J Mol Biol. 1984;175(2):159-174 (PDB 4HHB)
sources.notes: Folded native protein geometry — CC0 coordinates

sources.citation: Anfinsen CB. Principles that govern the folding of protein chains. Science. 1973;181(4096):223-230
sources.notes: Thermodynamic hypothesis — sequence encodes native fold

sources.citation: Dill KA, Chan HS. From Levinthal to pathways to funnels. Nat Struct Biol. 1997;4(1):10-19

config.voice_suffix: clear enthusiastic science communicator voice, precise but accessible diction, synthetic presenter only

shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @Julian-001: identical presenter face, smart-casual wardrobe, seamless neutral set, same eye-line to camera — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut. CONTINUITY LOCK @Set-Seamless-Neutral-001: identical neutral grey seamless — same backdrop tone mid-grey #9A9A98, same floor sweep, same subject-to-backdrop distance, same falloff — seamless continuation, zero jump cut. STYLE LOCK @Style-Cool-Clinical-001: cool-clinical grade — neutral white balance, low saturation, accurate color reproduction, minimal stylistic grading, science and product trust, no warm cozy cast, no film grain. Presenter addresses camera on seamless neutral, crisp science hook. Camera: locked medium, direct address. Neutral seamless 5500K bilateral soft key locked — symmetrical wrap, subtle nose shadow only, zero hue drift, no magenta vignette, no warm/cool lateral split. Neutral 5600–6500K even field — shadow definition for shape only, no gel, no warm practicals in frame. COLOR LOCK Seamless-Neutral: backdrop #9A9A98±2%, skin true-to-life, wardrobe colors accurate, no gel spill — no magenta edge gradient, no orange spotlight cone. GRADE LOCK Cool-Clinical: grey axis neutral, skin neither pink nor yellow pushed, saturation -15% global — forbid magenta tint, forbid orange warmth, forbid teal skin on shadows, forbid vintage fade. Locked-off or slow linear track; no handheld. Lip-synced, delivers: "A protein starts life as a floppy chain. Within milliseconds it folds into one exact three-dimensional shape — out of more possibilities than there are atoms in the universe. How does it find the right one so fast?" clear enthusiastic science communicator voice, precise but accessible diction, synthetic presenter only. Finish on presentational gesture peak, never hold dead stillness or dead frame.
shots.speech_text: A protein starts life as a floppy chain. Within milliseconds it folds into one exact three-dimensional shape — out of more possibilities than there are atoms in the universe. How does it find the right one so fast?
shots.on_screen: Observable · How a Protein Finds Its Shape

shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @Julian-001: identical presenter face, smart-casual wardrobe, seamless neutral set, same eye-line to camera — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut. CONTINUITY LOCK @Set-Seamless-Neutral-001: identical neutral grey seamless — same backdrop tone mid-grey #9A9A98, same floor sweep, same subject-to-backdrop distance, same falloff — seamless continuation, zero jump cut. STYLE LOCK @Style-Cool-Clinical-001: cool-clinical grade — neutral white balance, low saturation, accurate color reproduction, minimal stylistic grading, science and product trust, no warm cozy cast, no film grain. Presenter explains the phenomenon plainly, motivated gesture, clinical lighting. Camera: slow push-in medium. Neutral seamless 5500K bilateral soft key locked — symmetrical wrap, subtle nose shadow only, zero hue drift, no magenta vignette, no warm/cool lateral split. Neutral 5600–6500K even field — shadow definition for shape only, no gel, no warm practicals in frame. COLOR LOCK Seamless-Neutral: backdrop #9A9A98±2%, skin true-to-life, wardrobe colors accurate, no gel spill — no magenta edge gradient, no orange spotlight cone. GRADE LOCK Cool-Clinical: grey axis neutral, skin neither pink nor yellow pushed, saturation -15% global — forbid magenta tint, forbid orange warmth, forbid teal skin on shadows, forbid vintage fade. Locked-off or slow linear track; no handheld. Lip-synced, delivers: "It doesn't search them all. The chain slides downhill across an energy landscape shaped like a funnel — many different routes, all draining toward the same stable, native fold. In the crowded cell, helper proteins called chaperones give tricky chains a protected space to fold." clear enthusiastic science communicator voice, precise but accessible diction, synthetic presenter only. Finish on presentational gesture peak, never hold dead stillness or dead frame.
shots.speech_text: It doesn't search them all. The chain slides downhill across an energy landscape shaped like a funnel — many different routes, all draining toward the same stable, native fold. In the crowded cell, helper proteins called chaperones give tricky chains a protected space to fold.

shots.speech_text: In nineteen seventy-three, Anfinsen showed the instructions live in the sequence itself: unfold a protein, remove the stress, and it folds right back. And the finished shapes are measured directly — hemoglobin's fold was solved by crystallography to better than two angstroms.

shots.speech_text: Here is the funnel: a chain finding its fold along many parallel paths, not one script. The landscape is a schematic, the structure is a model — not a photograph — and folding is reversible, driven by physics, not effort.
shots.visualization_prompt: Protein folding funnel ensemble, native fold per PDB 4HHB, GroEL/GroES chaperonin, crowded cytoplasm, schematic energy landscape labeled, no faces, Jantzen molecular-cellular fidelity

shots.speech_text: Get the fold right and the protein works. Get it wrong and you have the misfolding behind Alzheimer's and Parkinson's. Cracking how sequence becomes shape is one of biology's deepest problems — and we're only now learning to predict it.
